title: NotiFine
description: An OptiFine alternative modpack brought you by the team behind TheBreakdown and SimpleGameHosting!
body:
NotiFine is an OptiFine replacement modpack based on Fabric. The goal is to update faster than OptiFine allowing you to enjoy Minecraft's newest features with the best performance and graphics settings!
**Brought to you by the team behind [TheBreakdown](https://thebreakdown.xyz) & [SimpleGameHosting](https://simplegamehosting.com?utm_source=curseforge&utm_medium=link&utm_campaign=notifine_curseforge&utm_id=notifine)**
# Features 🟢 **Strives to achieve OptiFine parity as quickly as possible on new versions.** 🟢 **Works with most other Fabric mods. (Expand the pack as you'd like!)** 🟢 **Includes quality-of-life features such as zoom and even capes!** 🟢 **"Vanilla" like allowing you to join vanilla and plugin-based servers without issue.** 🟢 **No changes needed server-side.**
